zh.lifeSummary: Amanieu VI d'Albret是Amanieu V d'Albret的兒子，於大約1215年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰藍德斯。他於大約1234年與Assalide de Tartas在法國努維勒-阿吉泰藍德斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1270年7月3日在法國阿奎泰洛吉吉加洛卡斯特利亞洛享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Amanieu VI d'Albret是Amanieu V d'Albret的儿子，于大约1215年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰藍德斯。他于大约1234年与Assalide de Tartas在法国努維勒-阿吉泰藍德斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1270年7月3日在法国阿奎泰洛吉吉加洛卡斯特利亞洛享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: Amanieu VI d'Albret was born about 1215, in Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France as the son of Amanieu V d'Albret. He married Assalide de Tartas about 1234, in Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 3 July 1270, in Casteljaloux, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, France, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Amanieu VI d'Albret est né environ 1215, à Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, fils de Amanieu V d'Albret. Il a épousé Assalide de Tartas environ 1234, à Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 3 juillet 1270, à Casteljaloux, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Amanieu VI d'Albret wurde um 1215 in Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich, als Sohn von Amanieu V d'Albret geboren. Er hat um 1234 in Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Assalide de Tartas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 3. Juli 1270 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Casteljaloux, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Amanieu VI d'Albret è nato il circa 1215 nel Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia come figlio di Amanieu V d'Albret. Lui sposato Assalide de Tartas circa 1234, nel Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 3 luglio 1270, nel Casteljaloux, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amanieu VI d'Albretは約1215年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインランズでAmanieu V d'Albretの息子として生まれた。約1234年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインランズでAssalide de Tartasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1270年7月3日にフランスアクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンカステルジャロウックスで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amanieu VI d'Albret(은)는 대략 1215년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 랜데스에서 Amanieu V d'Albret의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1234년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 랜데스에서 Assalide de Tartas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1270년 7월 3일 프랑스 아키테인 로트-트-가니 카스텔잘우스에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Amanieu VI d'Albret nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França filho de Amanieu V d'Albret. Ele casou-se com Assalide de Tartas aproximadamente 1234, em Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 3 de julho de 1270, em Casteljaloux, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, França, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Amanieu VI d'Albret родился около 1215 г. в местности ландесь, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. Его отца звали Amanieu V d'Albret. Он женился на женщине по имени Assalide de Tartas около 1234 г. в местности ландесь, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 3 июля 1270 г. в местности кастелджалоукс, лот-ет-гаронн, аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Amanieu VI d'Albret nació aproximadamente 1215, en Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia como hijo de Amanieu V d'Albret. Se casó con Assalide de Tartas aproximadamente 1234, en Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 3 de julio de 1270, en Casteljaloux, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 56 años.
